scope: public-source alpha and personal single-server Kubernetes reference
operational_limitations: A repository release does not prove a restore drill on the user's target server.
The one-node profile has no high availability.
Kafka, Neo4j, OpenSearch, Valkey, Prometheus and Grafana are not part of the automated authoritative restore.
Internal dependency transport in the personal one-node profile is not suitable for untrusted workloads or multiple operators.
